name: 10 MG Ezetimibe Tablets IP
about: 10 MG Ezetimibe Tablets IP is a general medicine that is used to lower cholesterol levels in the body. Each tablet contains a dosage of 10 mg and comes in a physical form of tablets. The medication should be taken as per the doctors suggestion. It is recommended to store the tablets in a dry and cool place to maintain their effectiveness. Each box contains 20x10 tablets, making it a convenient option for long-term use. This medication is manufactured in India and is suitable for those who need to manage their cholesterol levels effectively.

faq.a: It is recommended to store the tablets in a dry and cool place to maintain their effectiveness.

faq.a: Each box contains 20x10 tablets, making it a convenient option for long-term use.
